 118:             # 出现异常，使用默认值
 119:             enable_split = True
 120:             max_chars = 9
 121:             logging.warning(f"读取配置文件时出错: {str(e)}，使用默认字幕设置: enable_split=True, max_chars=9")
 122: 
 123:         # Split long sentences based on configuration
 124:         if enable_split:
 125:             logging.info("🎬 开始字幕分割处理...")
 126:             logging.info(f"📋 字幕分割配置: enable_split={enable_split}, max_chars={max_chars}")
 127: 
 128:             if isinstance(sentence_info, list):
 129:                 logging.info(f"📊 输入句子数量: {len(sentence_info)}")
 130: 
 131:                 # 记录分割前的统计
 132:                 total_chars_before = sum(len([c for c in s.get('text', '') if '\u4e00' <= c <= '\u9fff'])
 133:                                        for s in sentence_info)
 134:                 logging.info(f"📏 分割前总汉字数: {total_chars_before}")
 135: 
 136:                 # 转换数据格式：从 timestamp 格式转换为 ts_list 格式
 137:                 sentence_info_with_ts_list = []
 138:                 for sentence in sentence_info:
 139:                     sentence_copy = copy.deepcopy(sentence)
 140:                     text = sentence_copy.get('text', '')
 141:                     timestamp = sentence_copy.get('timestamp', [])
 142: 
 143:                     # 如果没有 ts_list 但有 timestamp，则构建 ts_list
 144:                     if 'ts_list' not in sentence_copy and timestamp and text:
 145:                         # 将文本按字符分割，与时间戳对应
 146:                         chars = list(text)
 147:                         ts_list = []
 148: 
 149:                         # 确保字符数和时间戳数匹配
 150:                         min_len = min(len(chars), len(timestamp))
 151:                         for i in range(min_len):
 152:                             char = chars[i]
 153:                             start_time = timestamp[i][0]
 154:                             end_time = timestamp[i][1]
 155:                             ts_list.append([char, start_time, end_time])
 156: 
 157:                         sentence_copy['ts_list'] = ts_list
 158:                         logging.info(f"   转换句子: '{text[:20]}...' -> {len(ts_list)}个词时间戳")
 159: 
 160:                     sentence_info_with_ts_list.append(sentence_copy)
 161: 
 162:                 processed_sentence_info = process_sentence_timestamps(
 163:                     sentence_info_with_ts_list,
 164:                     max_chars=max_chars
 165:                 )
 166: 
 167:                 # 记录分割后的统计
 168:                 total_chars_after = sum(len([c for c in s.get('text', '') if '\u4e00' <= c <= '\u9fff'])
 169:                                       for s in processed_sentence_info)
 170:                 logging.info(f"📊 分割后片段数量: {len(processed_sentence_info)}")
 171:                 logging.info(f"📏 分割后总汉字数: {total_chars_after}")
 172: 
 173:                 if total_chars_before != total_chars_after:
 174:                     logging.warning(f"⚠️ 字符数不匹配! 分割前: {total_chars_before}, 分割后: {total_chars_after}")
 175:                 else:
 176:                     logging.info("✅ 字符数匹配，分割成功")
 177:             else:
 178:                 processed_sentence_info = sentence_info
 179:                 logging.info("📝 输入不是列表格式，跳过分割")
 180:         else:
 181:             processed_sentence_info = sentence_info
 182:             logging.info("🚫 字幕分割功能已禁用")

 184:         # Ensure 'timestamp' key exists in each sentence dict for generate_srt
 185:         for s in processed_sentence_info:
 186:             if 'ts_list' in s and 'timestamp' not in s:
 187:                 s['timestamp'] = [[ts[1], ts[2]] for ts in s['ts_list']]

 189:         res_srt = generate_srt(processed_sentence_info)
 190:         
 191:         state['recog_res_raw'] = rec_result[0]['raw_text']

 193:         state['sentences'] = sentence_info
 194:         state['zimu'] = processed_sentence_info
 195:         res_text = rec_result[0]['text']

 198:     def clip(self, dest_text, start_ost, end_ost, state, dest_spk=None, output_dir=None, timestamp_list=None):

1030: def get_parser():
1031:     parser = ArgumentParser(
1032:         description='总结和剪切视频 | Summarize and Clip Video',
1033:         formatter_class=argparse.ArgumentDefaultsHelpFormatter)
1034:     parser.add_argument('--stage', type=int, default=1, choices=(1, 2), help='stage 1: 识别视频 | recognize video/audio; stage 2: 剪辑视频 | clip video')
1035:     parser.add_argument('--file', type=str, help='输入视频/音频路径 | video/audio path')
1036:     parser.add_argument('--sd_switch', type=str, default='no', choices=('yes', 'no'), help='是否进行说话人分离 | speaker diarization')
1037:     parser.add_argument('--hotwords', type=str, default="", help='热词，以空格分隔 | hotwords, separated by space')
1038:     parser.add_argument('--output_dir', type=str, default='./output', help='输出路径 | output path')
1039:     parser.add_argument('--dest_text', type=str, default='', help='待剪辑文本 | text to be clipped')
1040:     parser.add_argument('--dest_spk', type=str, default=None, help='说话人ID | speaker id')
1041:     parser.add_argument('--start_ost', type=int, default=0, help='开始时间偏移 | start offset(ms) for dest_text timestamp')
1042:     parser.add_argument('--end_ost', type=int, default=100, help='结束时间偏移 | end offset(ms) for dest_text timestamp')
1043:     parser.add_argument('--output_file', type=str, default=None, help='输出文件路径 | output file path')
1044:     # --config 参数已由 ArgumentParser 基类自动添加，无需重复定义
1045:     parser.add_argument('--lang', type=str, default="zh", help='语言(zh/en) | language(zh/en)')
1046:     parser.add_argument('--only_asr', action='store_true', help='仅进行语音识别，而不保存结果 | only do ASR, not save result')
1047:     parser.add_argument('--language', type=str, default=None, help='覆盖lang参数的语言设置(zh/en) | language(zh/en) to override lang param')
1048:     parser.add_argument('--subtitle_format', type=str, default='srt', choices=('srt', 'ass'), help='字幕格式 | subtitle format')
1049:     return parser
1050: 
1051: 
1052: def runner(stage, file, sd_switch, output_dir, dest_text, dest_spk, start_ost, end_ost, output_file, config=None, lang='zh', only_asr=False, language=None, subtitle_format='srt', hotwords=None):
1053:     # 如果提供了language参数，则覆盖lang参数
1054:     if language and language != lang:
1055:         lang = language
1056:         
1057:     # 设置默认空字符串而非None，以便传递给API
1058:     if hotwords is None:
1059:         hotwords = ""
1060:         
1061:     # 根据语言设置模型
1062:     if lang == 'zh':
1063:         funasr_model = AutoModel(
1064:             # ASR模型：Paraformer-large-zh 中文语音识别模型
1065:             # 在60,000小时普通话数据上训练，支持时间戳功能
1066:             model="damo/speech_paraformer-large-vad-punc_asr_nat-zh-cn-16k-common-vocab8404-pytorch",
1067:             # 或使用简化ID: "paraformer-zh"
1068:             
1069:             # VAD模型：基于 FSMN 的语音活动检测模型
1070:             # 用于检测音频中的语音片段，过滤非语音部分
1071:             vad_model="damo/speech_fsmn_vad_zh-cn-16k-common-pytorch",
1072:             
1073:             # 标点符号模型：基于 Transformer 的中英文标点符号预测模型
1074:             # 支持中英文混合文本的标点符号预测，词表大小471067
1075:             # 相比原来的中文模型(vocab272727)，这个模型支持更好的中英文混合处理
1076:             punc_model="damo/punc_ct-transformer_cn-en-common-vocab471067-large",
1077:             
1078:             # 说话人识别模型：基于 CAMPPlus 的说话人声纹特征提取模型
1079:             # 用于区分不同说话人的声音，支持说话人分离
1080:             spk_model="damo/speech_campplus_sv_zh-cn_16k-common",
1081:         )
1082:     else:  # 英文模型
1083:         funasr_model = AutoModel(
1084:             # ASR模型：基于 Paraformer 的英文语音识别模型
1085:             # 支持16k采样率的英文语音识别，词表大小4199
1086:             model="iic/speech_paraformer_asr-en-16k-vocab4199-pytorch",
1087:             
1088:             # 使用相同的 VAD、标点符号和说话人识别模型
1089:             vad_model="damo/speech_fsmn_vad_zh-cn-16k-common-pytorch",
1090:             punc_model="damo/punc_ct-transformer_cn-en-common-vocab471067-large",
1091:             spk_model="damo/speech_campplus_sv_zh-cn_16k-common",
1092:         )
1093:         
1094:     video_clipper = VideoClipper(funasr_model)
1095:     video_clipper.lang = lang
1096:     
1097:     if stage == 1:
1098:         if file.endswith(".mp4") or file.endswith(".MP4") or file.endswith(".mov") or file.endswith(".MOV"):
1099:             res_text, res_srt, state = video_clipper.video_recog(file, sd_switch, hotwords=hotwords, output_dir=output_dir)
1100:             # 检查是否只需要ASR结果
1101:             if only_asr:
1102:                 return res_text, res_srt
1103:             if output_dir is not None:
1104:                 os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)
1105:                 base_name, _ = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(file))
1106:                 res_text_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "script.txt")
1107:                 res_srt_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "total.srt")
1108:                 
1109:                 with open(res_text_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1110:                     f.write(res_text)
1111:                 with open(res_srt_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1112:                     f.write(res_srt)
1113:                     
1114:                 print(f"Recognized text saved to: {res_text_path}")
1115:                 print(f"Generated SRT subtitle saved to: {res_srt_path}")
1116: 
1117:             # 检查是否为多说话人模式并生成说话人可视化数据
1118:             if sd_switch == 'yes' or sd_switch == 'Yes' and 'sd_sentences' in state:
1119:                 try:
1120:                     from funclip.utils.visualization_utils import visualize_speaker_segments
1121:                     if output_dir is not None:
1122:                         viz_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f"{base_name}_speakers_viz.html")
1123:                         visualize_speaker_segments(state['sd_sentences'], output_file=viz_path)
1124:                         print(f"Speaker visualization saved to: {viz_path}")
1125:                 except Exception as e:
1126:                     print(f"Failed to generate speaker visualization: {str(e)}")
1127:                     
1128:                 # 生成说话人转写文本，每个说话人独立显示
1129:                 try:
1130:                     if output_dir is not None and 'sd_sentences' in state:
1131:                         spk_txt_path = os.path.join(output_dir, f"{base_name}_speakers.txt")
1132:                         with open(spk_txt_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1133:                             speakers = {}
1134:                             for sent in state['sd_sentences']:
1135:                                 if 'spk' in sent:
1136:                                     spk_id = f"说话人{sent['spk']}"
1137:                                     if spk_id not in speakers:
1138:                                         speakers[spk_id] = []
1139:                                     speakers[spk_id].append(sent['text'])
1140:                             
1141:                             for spk_id, texts in speakers.items():
1142:                                 f.write(f"=== {spk_id} ===\n")
1143:                                 f.write("\n".join(texts))
1144:                                 f.write("\n\n")
1145:                                 
1146:                         print(f"Speaker transcriptions saved to: {spk_txt_path}")
1147:                 except Exception as e:
1148:                     print(f"Failed to generate speaker transcriptions: {str(e)}")
1149:                 
1150:             return res_text, res_srt
1151:         else:
1152:             sr, data = librosa.load(file, sr=16000)
1153:             res_text, res_srt, state = video_clipper.recog((sr, data), sd_switch, None, hotwords, output_dir=output_dir)
1154:             
1155:             # 对于音频文件，同样生成ASS字幕
1156:             if output_dir is not None:
1157:                 try:
1158:                     # 使用统一字幕配置
1159:                     from funclip import config as cfg
1160:                     max_chars = getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS_PER_LINE', None) or getattr(cfg, 'SUBTITLE_MAX_CHARS', 9)
1161:                     from funclip.utils.subtitle_utils import generate_ass
1162:                     base_name, _ = os.path.splitext(os.path.basename(file))
1163:                     ass_file_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "total.ass")
1164: 
1165:                     # 使用分割后的字幕数据，而不是原始数据
1166:                     sentence_info = state.get('zimu', state['sentences'])
1167:                     logging.info(f"ASS字幕生成(音频): 使用{'分割后' if 'zimu' in state else '原始'}数据，共{len(sentence_info)}个片段")
1168: 
1169:                     # 获取字幕隐藏配置
1170:                     try:
1171:                         from pre.stage.subtitle.config import DEFAULT_HIDDEN_SUBTITLES_COUNT
1172:                         hidden_subtitles_count = DEFAULT_HIDDEN_SUBTITLES_COUNT
1173:                         logging.info(f"音频ASS字幕隐藏配置: 隐藏前{hidden_subtitles_count}条字幕")
1174:                     except Exception as e:
1175:                         hidden_subtitles_count = 3  # 默认隐藏3条
1176:                         logging.warning(f"无法读取字幕隐藏配置，使用默认值3: {e}")
1177: 
1178:                     # 对于音频文件，使用默认分辨率 720x1280
1179:                     ass_content = generate_ass(sentence_info,
1180:                                              video_width=720, video_height=1280,
1181:                                              line_limit=False, max_chars_per_line=max_chars,
1182:                                              hide_initial_subtitles=True,
1183:                                              hidden_subtitles_count=hidden_subtitles_count)
1184:                     with open(ass_file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
1185:                         f.write(ass_content)
1186:                     print(f"ASS字幕文件已生成: {ass_file_path} (每行最大{max_chars}字符)")
1187:                     logging.info(f"ASS字幕文件已生成，使用统一配置: max_chars={max_chars}")
1188:                 except Exception as e:
1189:                     logging.error(f"生成ASS字幕时出错: {str(e)}")
1190:             
1191:             return res_text, res_srt
1192:     elif stage == 2:
1193:         state = {}
1194: 
1195:         if file.endswith(".mp4") or file.endswith(".MP4") or file.endswith(".mov") or file.endswith(".MOV"):
1196:             logging.info(f"Stage 2: Processing video file: {file}")
1197: 
1198:             # 尝试加载已有的状态，避免重复语音识别
1199:             if output_dir and os.path.exists(output_dir):
1200:                 try:
1201:                     existing_state = load_state(output_dir)
1202:                     if existing_state and 'sentences' in existing_state:
1203:                         logging.info("✅ 找到已有的语音识别结果，跳过重复识别")
1204:                         state = existing_state
1205: 
1206:                         # 构建识别结果文本和SRT
1207:                         sentences = state.get('zimu', state['sentences'])
1208:                         res_text = state.get('recog_res_raw', '')
1209: 
1210:                         # 如果没有现成的SRT，生成一个
1211:                         if not res_text and sentences:
1212:                             res_text = ' '.join([s.get('text', '') for s in sentences])
1213: 
1214:                         # 生成SRT内容
1215:                         from funclip.utils.subtitle_utils import generate_srt
1216:                         res_srt = generate_srt(sentences)
1217: 
1218:                         logging.info(f"使用已有状态: {'分割后' if 'zimu' in state else '原始'}数据，共{len(sentences)}个片段")
1219:                     else:
1220:                         logging.info("未找到有效的语音识别状态，执行新的识别")
1221:                         res_text, res_srt, state = video_clipper.video_recog(file, sd_switch, hotwords=hotwords, output_dir=output_dir)
1222:                 except Exception as e:
1223:                     logging.warning(f"加载状态失败: {e}，执行新的识别")
1224:                     res_text, res_srt, state = video_clipper.video_recog(file, sd_switch, hotwords=hotwords, output_dir=output_dir)
1225:             else:
1226:                 logging.info("输出目录不存在，执行新的识别")
1227:                 res_text, res_srt, state = video_clipper.video_recog(file, sd_switch, hotwords=hotwords, output_dir=output_dir)
1228: 
1229:             if output_file is not None:
1230:                 output_file_ = output_file
1231:             else:
1232:                 output_file_ = None
1233:             clip_video_file, msg, clip_srt = video_clipper.video_clip(dest_text, start_ost, end_ost, state, dest_spk=dest_spk, output_dir=output_dir, subtitle_format=subtitle_format)
1234:             return clip_video_file, msg, clip_srt
1235:         else:
1236:             logging.info(f"Stage 2: Processing audio file: {file}")
1237:             sr, data = librosa.load(file, sr=16000)
1238:             res_text, res_srt, state = video_clipper.recog((sr, data), sd_switch, None, hotwords, output_dir=output_dir)
1239:             (sr, res_audio), msg, clip_srt = video_clipper.clip(dest_text, start_ost, end_ost, state, dest_spk=dest_spk, output_dir=output_dir)
1240:             return (sr, res_audio), msg, clip_srt
1241: 
1242: 
1243: def main(cmd=None):
1244:     parser = get_parser()
1245:     if cmd:
1246:         args = parser.parse_args(cmd.split())
1247:     else:
1248:         args = parser.parse_args()
1249:     try:
1250:         runner(args.stage, args.file, args.sd_switch, args.output_dir, args.dest_text,
1251:            args.dest_spk, args.start_ost, args.end_ost, args.output_file, config=args.config,
1252:            lang=args.lang, only_asr=args.only_asr, language=args.language, 
1253:            subtitle_format=args.subtitle_format, hotwords=args.hotwords)
1254:     except Exception as e:
1255:         import traceback
1256:         logging.error(f"Error: {e}")
1257:         traceback.print_exc()
1258:         sys.exit(1)
1259: 
1260: 
1261: def get_font_path():
1262:     """获取适用于当前系统的字体路径，优先使用相对路径"""
1263:     # 尝试使用STHeitiMedium作为默认字体(避免中文路径问题)
1264:     default_font = './font/STHeitiMedium.ttc'
1265:     if os.path.exists(default_font):
1266:         return default_font
1267:         
1268:     # 尝试其他相对路径(使用西文命名的字体)
1269:     relative_paths = [
1270:         './font/simhei.ttf',
1271:         './font/msyh.ttf',
1272:         './font/simsun.ttc'
1273:     ]
1274:     for path in relative_paths:
1275:         if os.path.exists(path):
1276:             return path
1277:         
1278:     # 获取当前脚本所在目录的绝对路径
1279:     current_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
1280:     project_root = os.path.dirname(current_dir)  # 项目根目录
1281:     
1282:     # 尝试项目根目录下的字体
1283:     font_dir = os.path.join(project_root, 'font')
1284:     if os.path.exists(font_dir) and os.path.isdir(font_dir):
1285:         # 优先尝试英文名称的字体文件
1286:         for font_name in ['STHeitiMedium.ttc', 'simhei.ttf', 'msyh.ttf']:
1287:             font_path = os.path.join(font_dir, font_name)
1288:             if os.path.exists(font_path):
1289:                 return font_path
1290:                 
1291:         # 尝试目录下任何可用的字体文件(避免中文名)
1292:         for font_file in os.listdir(font_dir):
1293:             # 跳过中文名字体文件，避免ImageMagick处理问题
1294:             if not any(u'\u4e00' <= c <= u'\u9fff' for c in font_file):  # 检测是否包含中文字符
1295:                 if font_file.lower().endswith(('.ttf', '.ttc', '.otf')):
1296:                     return os.path.join(font_dir, font_file)
1297:     
1298:     # 根据操作系统提供备选路径
1299:     system = platform.system()
1300:     if system == 'Windows':

   6: """

   9: 主要功能：

  13: import os
  14: import sys
  15: import logging
  16: import datetime
  17: import subprocess
  18: import threading

  22: # 导入工具函数
  23: sys.path.append(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
  24: from utils import run_command, input_with_timeout
  25: 
  26: # 确保能找到ai_prompt模块路径
  27: project_root = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
  28: if project_root not in sys.path:
  29:     sys.path.append(project_root)
  30: 
  31: # 导入文本预处理模块
  32: try:
  33:     from pre.ai_prompt.unified_preprocessor import preprocess_file
  34:     text_preprocessor_available = True
  35:     logging.info("成功导入统一预处理模块")
  36: except ImportError as e:
  37:     text_preprocessor_available = False
  38:     logging.warning(f"无法导入统一预处理模块，将使用原始处理流程: {str(e)}")

  40: # 获取系统默认编码
  41: def get_system_encoding():
  42:     # 获取系统默认编码
  43:     sys_encoding = locale.getpreferredencoding()
  44:     logging.info(f"系统默认编码: {sys_encoding}")
  45:     return sys_encoding
  46: 
  47: 
  48: def _fallback_generate_clip_text(script_file: str, clip_text_file: str) -> bool:
  49:     """Best-effort fallback: use ASR script text as clip text."""
  50:     try:
  51:         if not os.path.exists(script_file):
  52:             return False
  53:         with open(script_file, "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as src:
  54:             content = src.read().strip()
  55:         if not content:
  56:             return False
  57:         with open(clip_text_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as dst:
  58:             dst.write(content)
  59:         logging.warning("stage5 fallback enabled: copied script.txt to clip_text.txt")
  60:         return True
  61:     except Exception as exc:
  62:         logging.error(f"stage5 fallback failed: {exc}")
  63:         return False
  64: 
  65: def step5_ai_processing(input_video, config):
  66:     """第五步：大模型处理文本"""
  67:     logging.info("开始执行步骤5: 大模型处理文本")
  68:     
  69:     # 获取系统默认编码
  70:     system_encoding = get_system_encoding()
  71:     
  72:     # 识别结果的预期位置
  73:     base_name = os.path.basename(input_video)
  74:     name_without_ext, _ = os.path.splitext(base_name)
  75:     script_file = os.path.join(config["output_dir"], "script.txt")
  76:     clip_text_file = os.path.join(config["output_dir"], "clip_text.txt")
  77:     
  78:     # 创建模型输出日志文件路径
  79:     model_output_log = os.path.join(config["output_dir"], "model_output_log.txt")
  80:     
  81:     # 检查script.txt是否存在
  82:     if not os.path.exists(script_file):
  83:         logging.error(f"未找到语音识别结果文件: {script_file}")
  84:         print(f"错误: 未找到语音识别结果文件: {script_file}")
  85:         print("请先执行步骤3: 语音识别")
  86:         return False, input_video
  87:     
  88:     # 提示用户选择大模型
  89:     print("\n请选择要使用的大模型:")
  90:     print("1. OpenAI (需要设置OPENAI_API_KEY环境变量)")
  91:     print("2. 阿里通义千问 (需要设置QWEN_API_KEY环境变量)")
  92:     print("3. G4F免费接口 (不稳定，但无需API密钥)")
  93:     print("4. DeepSeek (需要设置DEEPSEEK_API_KEY环境变量)")
  94:     print("5. Kimi月之暗面 (需要设置KIMI_API_KEY环境变量)")
  95: 
  96:     # 检查是否为自动化模式（input_wait_time为0）
  97:     try:
  98:         from pre.stage.config import get_config
  99:         current_config = get_config()
 100:         wait_time = current_config.get("input_wait_time", 5)
 101:         if wait_time == 0:
 102:             print("🤖 自动化模式：使用默认选项 [2] 阿里通义千问")
 103:             model_choice = "2"
 104:         else:
 105:             model_choice = input_with_timeout("请输入选择 [1/2/3/4/5，默认2]: ", default="2")
 106:     except:
 107:         model_choice = input_with_timeout("请输入选择 [1/2/3/4/5，默认2]: ", default="2")
 108:     
 109:     # 根据用户选择设置模型
 110:     if model_choice == "1":
 111:         model_name = "openai"
 112:         # 检查是否设置了环境变量

 244:             "--input", input_file_for_model,
 245:             "--output", clip_text_file,
 246:             "--video", input_video,
 247:             "--model", model_name
 248:         ]
 249:     
 250:     # 开始之前先创建一个空的输出日志文件
 251:     print(f"\n模型处理日志将保存到: {model_output_log}")
 252:     with open(model_output_log, 'w', encoding=file_encoding) as f:
 253:         f.write(f"开始处理时间: {datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}\n")
 254:         f.write(f"使用模型: {model_name}\n")
 255:         f.write(f"使用编码: {file_encoding}\n")
 256:         if use_preprocessor and text_preprocessor_available:
 257:             f.write(f"已启用文本预处理\n")
 258:             f.write(f"预处理后的文件: {input_file_for_model}\n")
 259:             if custom_prompt_file:
 260:                 f.write(f"使用自定义提示词: {custom_prompt_file}\n")
 261:         f.write("-" * 80 + "\n\n")
 262:     
 263:     # 直接使用subprocess.Popen执行命令，并实时捕获输出
 264:     try:
 265:         # 将命令转换为字符串，方便日志记录
 266:         cmd_str = " ".join(cmd)
 267:         logging.info(f"执行命令: {cmd_str}")
 268:         
 269:         # 启动进程，并捕获标准输出和标准错误
 270:         process = subprocess.Popen(
 271:             cmd,
 272:             stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
 273:             stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
 274:             bufsize=1,  # 行缓冲，提高实时性
 275:             universal_newlines=True,  # 使用文本模式
 276:             encoding=file_encoding,  # 使用选择的编码
 277:             errors='replace'   # 遇到解码错误时替换为占位符，避免崩溃
 278:         )
 279:         
 280:         # 打开日志文件，准备追加写入
 281:         log_file = open(model_output_log, 'a', encoding=file_encoding)
 282:         
 283:         # 使用线程并行读取stdout和stderr，避免阻塞
 284:         def read_output(pipe, is_error=False):
 285:             for line in iter(pipe.readline, ''):
 286:                 # 写入日志文件
 287:                 log_file.write(line)
 288:                 log_file.flush()  # 立即刷新到磁盘
 289:                 
 290:                 # 输出到终端
 291:                 print(line, end='', flush=True)
 292:         
 293:         # 创建并启动读取线程
 294:         stdout_thread = threading.Thread(target=read_output, args=(process.stdout, False))
 295:         stderr_thread = threading.Thread(target=read_output, args=(process.stderr, True))
 296:         stdout_thread.daemon = True  # 设置为守护线程，主线程结束时自动退出
 297:         stderr_thread.daemon = True
 298:         stdout_thread.start()
 299:         stderr_thread.start()
 300:         
 301:         # 等待进程完成
 302:         return_code = process.wait()
 303:         
 304:         # 等待线程完成
 305:         stdout_thread.join(timeout=1)
 306:         stderr_thread.join(timeout=1)
 307:         
 308:         # 关闭日志文件
 309:         log_file.close()
 310:         
 311:         # 在日志文件中添加处理完成标记
 312:         with open(model_output_log, 'a', encoding=file_encoding) as f:
 313:             f.write("\n\n" + "-" * 80 + "\n")
 314:             f.write(f"处理完成时间: {datetime.datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}\n")
 315:             
 316:             # 检查剪辑文本文件是否存在且非空
 317:             file_success = os.path.exists(clip_text_file) and os.path.getsize(clip_text_file) > 0
 318:             return_code_success = (return_code == 0)
 319:             
 320:             # 只要有一个条件满足就认为是成功的
 321:             success = file_success or return_code_success
 322:             
 323:             if file_success and not return_code_success:
 324:                 f.write("注意: 返回码非零但文件已成功生成，仍视为处理成功\n")
 325:                 
 326:             f.write(f"处理{'成功' if success else '失败'}\n")
 327:         
 328:         # 显示处理结果
 329:         if success:
 330:             print("\n大模型处理完成，处理结果如下:")
 331:             try:
 332:                 with open(clip_text_file, 'r', encoding=file_encoding) as f:
 333:                     clip_text = f.read().strip()
 334:                 print("-" * 80)
 335:                 print(clip_text)
 336:                 print("-" * 80)
 337:                 print(f"处理结果已保存到: {clip_text_file}")
 338:                 print(f"完整处理日志已保存到: {model_output_log}")
 339:             except Exception as e:
 340:                 print(f"读取处理结果失败: {e}")

 342:                 for enc in ['utf-8', 'gbk', 'gb2312', 'latin1']:

 344:                         try:

 346:                             with open(clip_text_file, 'r', encoding=enc) as f:
 347:                                 clip_text = f.read().strip()
 348:                             print("-" * 80)
 349:                             print(clip_text)
 350:                             print("-" * 80)
 351:                             print(f"使用 {enc} 编码成功读取结果")
 352:                             break
 353:                         except Exception:
 354:                             continue
 355:         else:
 356:             print(f"\n大模型处理失败，请查看日志: {model_output_log}")
 357:             if _fallback_generate_clip_text(script_file=script_file, clip_text_file=clip_text_file):

 359:                 return True, input_video

  32:     # 提供一个简单的替代实现

  34:         """简单的状态加载替代实现"""

  58: # 尝试导入state_manager中的函数

  61: except ImportError:
  62:     # 如果导入失败，提供一个简单的替代实现
  63:     def get_basic_filename(filename):
  64:         """
  65:         提取文件名的基本部分，去除所有中间标记（简化版）
  66:         
  67:         Args:
  68:             filename: 原始文件名（可以是带路径的）
  69:             
  70:         Returns:
  71:             str: 基本文件名（不含中间标记）
  72:         """
  73:         # 提取文件名（不含路径和扩展名）
  74:         basename = os.path.basename(filename)
  75:         name_without_ext, ext = os.path.splitext(basename)
  76:         
  77:         # 定义中间标记
  78:         common_markers = ["转码版", "去气口版", "fixed", "nosilence", "fast", "clip", "智能剪辑无字幕版", "智能剪辑带字幕版"]
  79:         
  80:         # 按下划线分割
  81:         parts = name_without_ext.split('_')
  82:         basic_parts = []
  83:         
  84:         # 只保留不包含标记的部分
  85:         for part in parts:
  86:             if any(marker in part for marker in common_markers):
  87:                 break
  88:             basic_parts.append(part)
  89:         
  90:         # 如果没有找到基本部分，返回原名称
  91:         basic_name = '_'.join(basic_parts) if basic_parts else name_without_ext
  92:         
  93:         return basic_name + ext
  94:     
  95:     # 在导入失败时也定义一个简单的try_find_renamed_file替代函数
  96:     def try_find_renamed_file(path):
  97:         return None
  98: 
  99: def process_text_segments(text):
 100:     """
 101:     处理文本片段，去除空字符串、空白字符和只包含标点符号的片段，确保只有一个#作为分隔符
 102:     
 103:     Args:
 104:         text: 原始文本
 105:         
 106:     Returns:
 107:         str: 处理后的文本
 108:     """
 109:     # 定义中文和英文标点符号集合
 110:     punctuation_marks = set(['，', '。', '！', '？', '、', ',', '.', '?', '!', '；', ';', '：', ':', '"', '"', ''', ''', '（', '）', '(', ')', '《', '》'])
 111:     
 112:     # 分割文本
 113:     segments = text.split('#')
 114:     
 115:     # 初始化处理后的片段列表和被移除的片段列表
 116:     filtered_segments = []
 117:     removed_segments = []
 118:     
 119:     # 检查每个片段是否有效
 120:     for segment in segments:
 121:         # 去除前后空白
 122:         trimmed = segment.strip()
 123:         
 124:         # 如果是空字符串，直接跳过
 125:         if not trimmed:
 126:             removed_segments.append("空字符串")
 127:             continue
 128:         
 129:         # 检查是否只包含标点符号
 130:         only_punctuation = True
 131:         for char in trimmed:
 132:             if char not in punctuation_marks and not char.isspace():
 133:                 only_punctuation = False
 134:                 break
 135:         
 136:         # 如果只包含标点符号，则跳过
 137:         if only_punctuation:
 138:             removed_segments.append(f"纯标点符号: '{trimmed}'")
 139:             continue
 140:             
 141:         # 有效片段，加入过滤后列表
 142:         filtered_segments.append(trimmed)
 143:     
 144:     # 记录处理前后的变化
 145:     removed_count = len(segments) - len(filtered_segments)
 146:     
 147:     # 重新组合文本
 148:     processed_text = '#'.join(filtered_segments)
 149:     
 150:     # 记录处理结果
 151:     logging.info(f"待处理的剪辑文本: {text}")
 152:     logging.info(f"清理后的剪辑文本: {processed_text}")
 153:     
 154:     if removed_count > 0:
 155:         logging.info(f"移除了 {removed_count} 个无效片段: {', '.join(removed_segments)}")
 156:         print(f"处理文本: 移除了 {removed_count} 个无效片段 (空字符串或纯标点符号)")
 157:     
 158:     return processed_text
 159: 
 160: def step6_clip(input_video, config, audio_clipper):
 161:     """第六步：视频剪辑 (内联模式)"""
 162:     logging.info("开始执行步骤6: 视频剪辑 (内联模式)")
 163:     
 164:     # 检查是否存在clip_text.txt文件
 165:     clip_text_file = os.path.join(config["output_dir"], "clip_text.txt")
 166:     if not os.path.exists(clip_text_file):
 167:         print(f"\n未找到剪辑文本文件: {clip_text_file}")
 168:         print("是否要创建一个新的剪辑文本文件? (y/n)")
 169:         choice = input_with_timeout("> ", default="y").strip().lower()
 170:         if choice != 'y':
 171:             print("未创建剪辑文本文件，无法继续执行剪辑")
 172:             return False, input_video
 173:     else:
 174:         print(f"\n找到剪辑文本文件: {clip_text_file}")
 175:         print("是否使用此文件? (y/n)")
 176:         choice = input_with_timeout("> ", default="y").strip().lower()
 177:         if choice != 'y':
 178:             print("不使用现有剪辑文本文件，请输入新的剪辑文本:")
 179:     
 180:     # 提示用户输入剪辑文本或文本文件
 181:     print("\n请输入要剪辑的目标文本片段或直接输入文本文件路径:")
 182:     print("重要提示：所有文本最终都将保存到 'output/clip_text.txt' 文件中再执行")
 183:     print("为避免格式问题，建议直接修改 'output/clip_text.txt' 文件内容后，按回车使用默认选项")
 184:     print("如果您仍想输入文本，可以使用#符号分割多个文本片段，例如:")
 185:     print("'老铁们瞅瞅正定#彩礼要十万块钱#平山的老丈人最刺激'")
 186:     user_input = input_with_timeout("> ", default="")
 187:     
 188:     # 处理文本输入
 189:     if not user_input.strip():
 190:         # 尝试从clip_text.txt读取
 191:         try:
 192:             with open(clip_text_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 193:                 dest_text = f.read().strip()
 194:                 if not dest_text:
 195:                     print("clip_text.txt文件为空，请重新输入")
 196:                     return False, input_video
 197:                 print(f"使用clip_text.txt中的文本: {dest_text[:50]}{'...' if len(dest_text) > 50 else ''}")
 198:         except Exception as e:
 199:             print(f"读取clip_text.txt失败: {e}")
 200:             return False, input_video
 201:     # 检查是否是文件路径
 202:     elif (user_input.startswith("file:") or
 203:           (user_input.startswith(("c:", "d:", "e:", "f:", "./", "../")) or
 204:            user_input.endswith((".txt", ".md", ".text")))):
 205:         
 206:         # 如果以file:开头，去掉前缀
 207:         if user_input.startswith("file:"):
 208:             file_path = user_input[5:].strip()
 209:         else:
 210:             file_path = user_input.strip()
 211:             
 212:         try:
 213:             with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 214:                 dest_text = f.read().strip()
 215:                 if not dest_text:
 216:                     print("文件内容为空，请重新输入")
 217:                     return False, input_video
 218:             print(f"已从文件 {file_path} 读取文本: {dest_text[:50]}{'...' if len(dest_text) > 50 else ''}")
 219:         except Exception as e:
 220:             print(f"读取文件失败: {e}")
 221:             return False, input_video
 222:     else:
 223:         dest_text = user_input
 224:         if not dest_text.strip():
 225:             print("输入文本为空，请重新输入")
 226:             return False, input_video
 227: 
 228:     # 处理文本，去除空字符串
 229:     dest_text = process_text_segments(dest_text)
 230:     if not dest_text:
 231:         print("处理后的文本为空，请重新输入有效的文本")
 232:         return False, input_video
 233: 
 234:     # 保存文本到clip_text.txt
 235:     try:
 236:         with open(clip_text_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
 237:             f.write(dest_text)
 238:         print(f"已将文本保存到文件: {clip_text_file}")
 239:     except Exception as e:
 240:         print(f"保存文本到文件失败: {e}")
 241:         return False, input_video
 242: 
 243:     # 检查文本格式
 244:     if not any('\u4e00' <= char <= '\u9fff' for char in dest_text):
 245:         print("警告：文本中未检测到中文字符，可能存在问题")
 246:         print("请检查文本是否正确，或尝试重新输入")
 247:         return False, input_video
 248: 
 249:     try:
 250:         output_dir = config["output_dir"]
 251:         
 252:         # 加载语音识别阶段保存的状态
 253:         state = load_state(output_dir)
 254:         state['video_filename'] = input_video
 255:         state['video'] = mpy.VideoFileClip(input_video)
 256:         
 257:         # 定义输出文件路径
 258:         # 提取基本文件名（不含中间标记）
 259:         try:
 260:             from pre.main.state_manager import get_basic_filename
 261:             # 调用函数获取带扩展名的基本文件名
 262:             basic_filename_with_ext = get_basic_filename(input_video)
 263:             # 分离基本文件名和扩展名
 264:             basic_name_without_ext, _ = os.path.splitext(basic_filename_with_ext)
 265:         except ImportError:
 266:             # 在导入失败的情况下，也确保只取文件名部分
 267:             base = os.path.basename(input_video)
 268:             basic_name_without_ext, _ = os.path.splitext(base)
 269:             # 应用本地的get_basic_filename逻辑来清理文件名
 270:             # 注意：这里的get_basic_filename是本文件定义的简化版
 271:             cleaned_filename_with_ext = get_basic_filename(basic_name_without_ext + _)
 272:             basic_name_without_ext, _ = os.path.splitext(cleaned_filename_with_ext)
 273: 
 274:         output_file = os.path.join(output_dir, f"{basic_name_without_ext}_智能剪辑无字幕版.mp4")
 275:         state['clip_video_file'] = output_file
 276:         
 277:         clip_srt_file = state['clip_video_file'][:-3] + 'srt'
 278: 
 279:         # 根据audio_clipper是否可用选择剪辑方法
 280:         if audio_clipper is not None:
 281:             # 直接调用clipper对象的方法进行剪辑
 282:             # 切换到新的高性能ffmpeg直接调用模式
 283:             clip_video_file, message, srt_clip = audio_clipper.video_clip_direct_ffmpeg(
 284:                 dest_text,
 285:                 config.get("clip_start_ost", 0),
 286:                 config.get("clip_end_ost", 0),
 287:                 state,
 288:                 output_dir=output_dir
 289:             )
 290: 
 291:             logging.warning("Clipping Log: {}".format(message))
 292:             logging.warning("Save clipped mp4 file to {}".format(clip_video_file))
 293:         else:
 294:             # 使用subprocess调用videoclipper.py的stage2进行剪辑
 295:             logging.info("使用subprocess调用videoclipper.py进行剪辑")
 296: 
 297:             # 构建stage2命令
 298:             stage2_cmd = [
 299:                 "python", "funclip/videoclipper.py",
 300:                 "--stage", "2",
 301:                 "--file", input_video,
 302:                 "--dest_text", dest_text,
 303:                 "--start_ost", str(config.get("clip_start_ost", 0)),
 304:                 "--end_ost", str(config.get("clip_end_ost", 0)),
 305:                 "--output_file", output_file,
 306:                 "--output_dir", output_dir
 307:             ]
 308: 
 309:             logging.info(f"执行剪辑命令: {' '.join(stage2_cmd)}")
 310: 
 311:             try:
 312:                 result = subprocess.run(stage2_cmd, check=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
 313:                 logging.info("剪辑命令执行成功")
 314: 
 315:                 # 查找实际生成的视频文件
 316:                 output_dir_files = os.listdir(output_dir)
 317:                 clip_video_file = None
 318:                 for file in output_dir_files:
 319:                     if file.endswith(".mp4") and "_no" in file:
 320:                         clip_video_file = os.path.join(output_dir, file)
 321:                         break
 322: 
 323:                 if not clip_video_file:
 324:                     clip_video_file = output_file
 325: 
 326:                 logging.warning("Save clipped mp4 file to {}".format(clip_video_file))
 327: 
 328:             except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e:
 329:                 logging.error(f"剪辑命令执行失败: {e}")
 330:                 logging.error(f"错误输出: {e.stderr}")
 331:                 return False, input_video
 332: 
 333:         # with open(clip_srt_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as fout:
 334:         #     fout.write(srt_clip)
 335:         #     logging.warning("Write clipped subtitle to {}".format(clip_srt_file))
 336: 
 337:         # 检查是否需要自动更新语音识别
 338:         auto_update_recognition = config.get("auto_update_recognition", True)
 339:         if auto_update_recognition:
 340:             logging.info("视频剪辑成功，开始自动更新语音识别文档")
 341: 
 342:             # 直接调用stage4进行语音识别更新
 343:             recognition_success = run_stage4_on_clipped_video(clip_video_file, config, audio_clipper)
 344: 
 345:             if recognition_success:
 346:                 logging.info("语音识别文档更新成功")
 347:             else:
 348:                 logging.warning("语音识别文档更新失败，但视频剪辑成功")
 349:         else:
 350:             logging.info("已禁用自动语音识别更新")
 351: 
 352:         return True, clip_video_file
 353: 
 354:     except Exception as e:
 355:         logging.error(f"视频剪辑执行出错: {str(e)}")
 356:         import traceback
 357:         logging.error(traceback.format_exc())
 358:         return False, input_video
 359: 
 360: 
 361: 
 362: def find_latest_matching_file(original_path):
 363:     """
 364:     通用方法：提取基本文件名并查找最新的匹配文件
 365:     
 366:     Args:
 367:         original_path: 原始文件路径
 368:         
 369:     Returns:
 370:         找到的文件路径，如果没找到则返回None
 371:     """
 372:     try:
 373:         # 提取文件路径和名称
 374:         file_dir = os.path.dirname(original_path)
 375:         file_name = os.path.basename(original_path)
 376:         name_without_ext, ext = os.path.splitext(file_name)
 377:         
 378:         # 使用get_basic_filename提取基本文件名（不含扩展名）
 379:         basic_filename = get_basic_filename(file_name)
 380:         basic_name = os.path.splitext(basic_filename)[0]
 381:         
 382:         # 首先尝试完全匹配原始路径
 383:         if os.path.exists(original_path):
 384:             logging.info(f"原始文件存在: {original_path}")
 385:             return original_path
 386:         
 387:         # 使用glob查找匹配的文件
 388:         search_pattern = os.path.join(file_dir, f"{basic_name}*{ext}")
 389:         logging.info(f"搜索模式: {search_pattern}")
 390:         matching_files = glob.glob(search_pattern)
 391:         
 392:         if matching_files:
 393:             # 按修改时间排序，选择最新的文件
 394:             matching_files.sort(key=os.path.getmtime, reverse=True)
 395:             newest_file = matching_files[0]
 396:             logging.info(f"找到最新的匹配文件: {newest_file}")
 397:             return newest_file
 398:         else:
 399:             # 如果目录不存在或找不到任何匹配的文件，尝试在输出目录中查找
 400:             output_dirs = ["output", "./output", "../output"]
 401:             for output_dir in output_dirs:
 402:                 if os.path.exists(output_dir):
 403:                     # 尝试查找基本名称的文件
 404:                     output_pattern = os.path.join(output_dir, f"{basic_name}*{ext}")
 405:                     output_files = glob.glob(output_pattern)
 406:                     
 407:                     if output_files:
 408:                         # 按修改时间排序，选择最新的文件
 409:                         output_files.sort(key=os.path.getmtime, reverse=True)
 410:                         newest_file = output_files[0]
 411:                         logging.info(f"在输出目录找到最新的匹配文件: {newest_file}")
 412:                         return newest_file
 413:                     
 414:                     # 如果找不到特定名称的文件，尝试搜索所有mp4文件
 415:                     all_mp4_pattern = os.path.join(output_dir, f"*{ext}")
 416:                     all_mp4_files = glob.glob(all_mp4_pattern)
 417:                     
 418:                     if all_mp4_files:
 419:                         # 按修改时间排序，选择最新的文件
 420:                         all_mp4_files.sort(key=os.path.getmtime, reverse=True)
 421:                         newest_file = all_mp4_files[0]
 422:                         logging.info(f"在输出目录找到最新的{ext}文件: {newest_file}")
 423:                         return newest_file
 424:         
 425:         # 尝试使用state_manager中的函数
 426:         possible_file = try_find_renamed_file(original_path)
 427:         if possible_file:
 428:             logging.info(f"使用state_manager找到文件: {possible_file}")
 429:             return possible_file
 430:             
 431:         return None
 432:     except Exception as e:
 433:         logging.error(f"通用文件查找失败: {str(e)}")
 434:         return None
 435: 
 436: def run_stage4_on_clipped_video(clipped_video, config, audio_clipper):
 437:     """对剪辑后的视频执行语音识别，重新生成识别文档 - 直接调用stage4"""
 438:     logging.info(f"开始对剪辑后的视频执行语音识别: {clipped_video}")
 439: 
 440:     # 在自动化模式下，不需要用户确认
 441:     wait_time = config.get("input_wait_time", 0)
 442:     if wait_time > 0:
 443:         print(f"\n🔄 开始对剪辑后的视频执行语音识别")
 444:         print("这将重新生成语音识别文档，确保时间戳与剪辑后的视频匹配")
 445: 
 446:         prompt_text = f"是否要继续执行语音识别? (y/n, {wait_time}秒后自动确认)"
 447:         choice = input_with_timeout(prompt_text, default="y", timeout=wait_time).strip().lower()
 448:         if choice != 'y':
 449:             print("用户取消了对剪辑后视频的语音识别")
 450:             return False
 451: 
 452:     # 确保视频文件存在
 453:     if not os.path.exists(clipped_video):
 454:         logging.error(f"视频文件不存在: {clipped_video}")
 455:         return False
 456: 
 457:     try:
 458:         # 导入stage4的语音识别函数
 459:         try:
 460:             from pre.stage.stage4 import step4_recognize
 461:         except ImportError:
 462:             from stage4 import step4_recognize
 463: 
 464:         # 直接调用stage4，参数保持一致
 465:         logging.info("调用stage4进行语音识别")
 466:         success, state = step4_recognize(clipped_video, config, audio_clipper)
 467: 
 468:         if success:
 469:             logging.info("语音识别成功完成，文档已更新")
 470:             return True
 471:         else:
 472:             logging.error("语音识别失败")
 473:             return False
 474: 
 475:     except Exception as e:
 476:         logging.error(f"执行语音识别时出错: {str(e)}")
 477:         import traceback
 478:         logging.error(traceback.format_exc())
 479:         return False
 480: 
 481: 
 482: 
 483: if __name__ == "__main__":
 484:     # 配置日志
 485:     logging.basicConfig(
 486:         level=logging.INFO,
 487:         format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s',
 488:         handlers=[
 489:             logging.FileHandler("output/stage6.log"),
 490:             logging.StreamHandler()
 491:         ]
 492:     )
 493:     
 494:     def get_config():
 495:         """获取配置"""
 496:         return {
 497:             "output_dir": "output",
 498:             "process_timeout": 1800,  # 30分钟超时
 499:             "use_direct_mode": True,   # 默认使用直接模式
 500:             "input_wait_time": 5,      # 用户输入等待时间（秒）
 501:             "clip_start_ost": 0,       # 剪辑开始偏移
 502:             "clip_end_ost": 0,         # 剪辑结束偏移
 503:             "auto_update_recognition": True  # 剪辑后自动更新语音识别
 504:         }
 505:     
 506:     # 检查是否需要测试get_basic_filename函数
 507:     if "--test-basic-filename" in sys.argv:
 508:         print("\n测试get_basic_filename函数")
 509:         test_filenames = [
 510:             "班哥.mp4",
 511:             "班哥_转码版.mp4",
 512:             "班哥_去气口版.mp4",
 513:             "班哥_fixed.mp4",
 514:             "班哥_转码版_去气口版.mp4",
 515:             "班哥_转码版_智能剪辑无字幕版.mp4",
 516:             "班哥_智能剪辑无字幕版.mp4",
 517:             "班哥_智能剪辑带字幕版.mp4",
 518:             "/path/to/班哥_智能剪辑带字幕版_20230101.mp4",
 519:             "output/班哥_转码版_去气口版_fixed_智能剪辑无字幕版.mp4",
 520:         ]
 521:         
 522:         print("\n测试结果:")
 523:         for filename in test_filenames:
 524:             basic_name = get_basic_filename(filename)
 525:             print(f"原始文件名: {filename}")
 526:             print(f"基本文件名: {basic_name}")
 527:             print("-" * 50)
 528:         
 529:         print("\n测试完成!")
 530:         sys.exit(0)
 531:     
 532:     if len(sys.argv) < 2:
 533:         print("用法: python stage6.py <输入视频文件>")
 534:         print("选项:")
 535:         print("  --direct         使用直接运行模式执行语音识别")
 536:         print("  --no-direct      禁用直接运行模式，使用标准subprocess执行")
 537:         print("  --auto-update    启用剪辑后自动更新语音识别（默认）")
 538:         print("  --no-auto-update 禁用剪辑后自动更新语音识别")
 539:         print("  --test-basic-filename  测试get_basic_filename函数")
 540:         print("")
 541:         print("说明:")
 542:         print("  Stage6会对视频进行智能剪辑，改变视频时间轴。")
 543:         print("  为确保Stage7添加字幕时时间戳正确，默认会在剪辑后")
 544:         print("  自动重新执行语音识别来更新相关文档。")
 545:         sys.exit(1)
 546:     
 547:     input_video = sys.argv[1]
 548:     config = get_config()
 549:     
 550:     # 确保输出目录存在
 551:     os.makedirs(config["output_dir"], exist_ok=True)
 552:     
 553:     # 添加命令行选项，控制直接模式和自动更新
 554:     if "--direct" in sys.argv:
 555:         config["use_direct_mode"] = True
 556:         print("使用直接运行模式执行语音识别")
 557:     elif "--no-direct" in sys.argv:
 558:         config["use_direct_mode"] = False
 559:         print("禁用直接运行模式，使用标准subprocess执行语音识别")
 560:     else:
 561:         # 默认使用直接模式
 562:         config["use_direct_mode"] = True
 563: 
 564:     # 控制是否自动更新语音识别
 565:     if "--no-auto-update" in sys.argv:
 566:         config["auto_update_recognition"] = False
 567:         print("禁用剪辑后自动更新语音识别")
 568:     elif "--auto-update" in sys.argv:
 569:         config["auto_update_recognition"] = True
 570:         print("启用剪辑后自动更新语音识别")
 571:     
 572:     # 初始化audio_clipper
 573:     try:
 574:         from funclip.videoclipper import VideoClipper
 575:         from funasr import AutoModel
 576: 
 577:         # 初始化FunASR模型
 578:         funasr_model = AutoModel(
 579:             model="damo/speech_paraformer-large-vad-punc_asr_nat-zh-cn-16k-common-vocab8404-pytorch",
 580:             vad_model="damo/speech_fsmn_vad_zh-cn-16k-common-pytorch",
 581:             punc_model="damo/punc_ct-transformer_cn-en-common-vocab471067-large",
 582:             spk_model="damo/speech_campplus_sv_zh-cn_16k-common",
 583:         )
 584: 
 585:         audio_clipper = VideoClipper(funasr_model)
 586:         print("成功初始化VideoClipper")
 587:     except Exception as e:
 588:         print(f"初始化VideoClipper失败: {e}")
 589:         print("将尝试使用替代方案...")
 590:         audio_clipper = None
 591: 
 592:     # 执行视频剪辑
 593:     success, output_video = step6_clip(input_video, config, audio_clipper)
 594: 
 595:     if success:
 596:         print(f"视频剪辑成功，输出文件: {output_video}")
 597: 
 598:         # 根据配置决定是否自动更新语音识别
 599:         if config.get("auto_update_recognition", True):
 600:             # 在剪辑成功后，重新执行Stage2（语音识别去气口）以更新相关文档
 601:             print("\n开始重新执行Stage2（语音识别去气口）以更新时间戳和文档...")
 602:             print("这是必要的步骤，因为Stage6视频剪辑改变了时间轴，需要:")
 603:             print("1. 对剪辑后的视频重新执行Stage2（语音识别去气口）")
 604:             print("2. 重新生成语音识别文档(script.txt, total.srt, total.ass等)")
 605:             print("3. 覆盖原来的文档，确保Stage7添加字幕时时间戳正确")
 606: 
 607:             # 重新执行Stage4（语音识别）
 608:             recognition_success = run_stage4_on_clipped_video(output_video, config, audio_clipper)
 609: 
 610:             if recognition_success:
 611:                 print("\n✅ Stage6完成：视频剪辑和Stage2语音识别文档更新都成功")
 612:                 print(f"剪辑后的视频: {output_video}")
 613:                 print("已重新生成并覆盖以下文档:")
 614:                 print("  - script.txt (完整识别文本)")
 615:                 print("  - total.srt (SRT格式字幕)")
 616:                 print("  - total.ass (ASS格式字幕)")
 617:                 print("  - 其他相关时间戳文件")
 618:                 print("现在可以安全地执行Stage7添加字幕，时间戳将正确匹配")
 619:             else:
 620:                 print("\n⚠️  警告：视频剪辑成功，但Stage2语音识别文档更新失败")
 621:                 print("这将导致Stage7添加字幕时出现时间不匹配的问题")
 622:                 print("建议手动重新执行Stage2或检查错误日志")
 623:         else:
 624:             print("\n⚠️  注意：已禁用自动文档更新")
 625:             print("由于Stage6视频剪辑改变了时间轴，强烈建议在Stage7之前:")
 626:             print("1. 手动执行Stage2（语音识别去气口）")
 627:             print("2. 重新生成语音识别文档")
 628:             print("3. 或者使用 --auto-update 参数重新运行Stage6")
 629: 
 630:         sys.exit(0)
 631:     else:
 632:         print("视频剪辑失败")
 633:         sys.exit(1)

   6: """
   7: 视频处理流水线 - 阶段9：文件整理
   8: 
   9: 主要功能：
  10: - 将output目录中生成的处理后视频文件剪切到以原始视频文件名命名的子文件夹中
  11: - 帮助用户更好地组织和管理处理后的视频文件
  12: """
  13: 
  14: import os
  15: import sys
  16: import logging
  17: import glob
  18: import shutil
  19: import re
  20: import time
  21: import json
  22: from datetime import datetime
  23: 
  24: # 尝试释放所有日志处理程序，防止文件锁定
  25: for logger_name in logging.root.manager.loggerDict:
  26:     logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
  27:     if logger.handlers:
  28:         for handler in logger.handlers[:]:
  29:             logger.removeHandler(handler)
  30:             if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
  31:                 handler.close()
  32: 
  33: # 关闭根日志处理程序
  34: for handler in logging.root.handlers[:]:
  35:     logging.root.removeHandler(handler)
  36:     if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
  37:         handler.close()
  38: 
  39: # 导入工具函数
  40: sys.path.append(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__)))
  41: from utils import input_with_timeout
  42: 
  43: # 确保日志不重复
  44: logger = logging.getLogger("stage9")
  45: # 如果有处理器，清除它们
  46: if logger.handlers:
  47:     logger.handlers.clear()
  48: # 禁用向上传播，防止消息传递到父记录器
  49: logger.propagate = False
  50: 
  51: def clean_filename(filename):
  52:     """
  53:     清理文件名，去除特定的后缀
  54:     """
  55:     # 移除 "_智能剪辑带字幕版_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS" 格式的后缀
  56:     filename = re.sub(r'_智能剪辑带字幕版_\d{8}_\d{6}$', '', filename)
  57:     # 移除 "_智能剪辑带字幕版" 后缀
  58:     filename = re.sub(r'_智能剪辑带字幕版$', '', filename)
  59:     # 移除 "_智能识别字幕版" 后缀
  60:     filename = re.sub(r'_智能识别字幕版$', '', filename)
  61:     # 移除 "_final" 后缀
  62:     filename = re.sub(r'_final$', '', filename)
  63:     return filename
  64: 
  65: def extract_original_filename(output_dir):
  66:     """
  67:     从state.json文件中读取原始视频文件名
  68:     
  69:     Args:
  70:         output_dir: 输出目录路径
  71:         
  72:     Returns:
  73:         str: 提取出的原始文件名
  74:     """
  75:     # 读取state.json文件
  76:     state_json_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "state.json")
  77:     
  78:     if not os.path.exists(state_json_path):
  79:         print(f"错误: 找不到state.json文件: {state_json_path}")
  80:         return None
  81:     
  82:     try:
  83:         with open(state_json_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
  84:             state_data = json.load(f)
  85:         
  86:         # 检查是否有original_video_name字段且不为null
  87:         if 'original_video_name' in state_data and state_data['original_video_name']:
  88:             original_name = state_data['original_video_name']
  89:             return clean_filename(original_name)
  90:         
  91:         # 优先尝试从步骤映射中找到最早的有效输入文件
  92:         if 'steps_mapping' in state_data:
  93:             # 获取所有步骤号，并尝试转换为浮点数进行排序
  94:             step_keys = []
  95:             for key in state_data['steps_mapping'].keys():
  96:                 try:
  97:                     step_keys.append(float(key))
  98:                 except ValueError:
  99:                     continue  # 忽略无法转换为数字的键
 100:             
 101:             # 从小到大排序步骤号
 102:             step_keys.sort()
 103:             
 104:             for step_key in step_keys:
 105:                 # 将浮点数转回字符串key (处理6.5这样的key)
 106:                 str_key = str(step_key)
 107:                 if str_key.endswith('.0'):
 108:                     str_key = str(int(step_key))
 109: 
 110:                 step_info = state_data['steps_mapping'].get(str_key)
 111:                 # 检查是否是有效的步骤信息且包含有效的输入文件
 112:                 if step_info and 'input_file' in step_info and step_info['input_file']:
 113:                     # 找到了第一个有输入文件的步骤
 114:                     input_file = step_info['input_file']
 115:                     basename = os.path.basename(input_file)
 116:                     name_without_ext = os.path.splitext(basename)[0]
 117:                     print(f"从步骤 {str_key} 的输入文件提取原始视频名称: {name_without_ext}")
 118:                     return clean_filename(name_without_ext)
 119:         
 120:         # 如果没有找到步骤1的信息，尝试从input_file字段获取文件名
 121:         if 'input_file' in state_data and state_data['input_file']:
 122:             # 获取原始输入文件的基本名称（不包括路径）
 123:             input_file = state_data['input_file']
 124:             basename = os.path.basename(input_file)
 125:             # 移除扩展名
 126:             name_without_ext = os.path.splitext(basename)[0]
 127:             print(f"警告: state.json中没有原始视频名称信息，从当前input_file提取: {name_without_ext}")
 128:             return clean_filename(name_without_ext)
 129:     
 130:     except Exception as e:
 131:         print(f"读取state.json时出错: {str(e)}")
 132:     
 133:     print("错误: 无法从state.json获取原始视频名称")
 134:     return None
 135: 
 136: def step9_organize_files(input_video, config):
 137:     """第九步：将处理后的文件剪切到以原始视频名命名的子文件夹"""
 138:     # 尝试释放所有日志处理程序，防止文件锁定
 139:     for logger_name in logging.root.manager.loggerDict:
 140:         logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
 141:         if logger.handlers:
 142:             for handler in logger.handlers[:]:
 143:                 logger.removeHandler(handler)
 144:                 if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
 145:                     handler.close()
 146:     
 147:     # 关闭根日志处理程序
 148:     for handler in logging.root.handlers[:]:
 149:         logging.root.removeHandler(handler)
 150:         if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
 151:             handler.close()
 152:             
 153:     logger.info("开始执行步骤9: 文件整理")
 154:     print("\n===== 步骤9: 文件整理 =====")
 155:     
 156:     output_dir = config.get("output_dir", "output")
 157:     
 158:     # 获取是否删除原始文件的配置，默认为False（不删除）
 159:     delete_original = config.get("organize_delete_original", False)
 160:     
 161:     # 显示操作类型
 162:     operation_type = "移动" if delete_original else "复制"
 163:     print(f"文件整理模式: {operation_type}文件到子文件夹")
 164:     logger.info(f"文件整理模式: {operation_type}文件到子文件夹，是否删除原始文件: {delete_original}")
 165:     
 166:     # 从state.json获取原始文件名
 167:     original_filename = extract_original_filename(output_dir)
 168:     
 169:     if not original_filename:
 170:         print("错误: 无法获取原始视频文件名，中止处理")
 171:         return False, input_video
 172:     
 173:     print(f"原始视频文件名: {original_filename}")
 174:     
 175:     # 创建以原始文件名命名的子文件夹
 176:     target_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, original_filename)
 177:     os.makedirs(target_dir, exist_ok=True)
 178:     print(f"创建目标文件夹: {target_dir}")
 179:     
 180:     # 获取output目录中的所有文件（非文件夹）
 181:     all_files = []
 182:     exclude_files = [".gitkeep", "README.md"]
 183:     
 184:     for item in os.listdir(output_dir):
 185:         item_path = os.path.join(output_dir, item)
 186:         # 只处理文件，不处理文件夹
 187:         if os.path.isfile(item_path) and item not in exclude_files:
 188:             # 检查文件是否在目标文件夹中（使用精确的目录比较）
 189:             if os.path.dirname(item_path) != target_dir:
 190:                 all_files.append(item_path)
 191:     
 192:     total_files = len(all_files)
 193:     
 194:     if total_files == 0:
 195:         print(f"未找到任何文件需要整理")
 196:         # 即使没有文件，我们仍然会处理文件夹
 197:     else:
 198:         print(f"找到 {total_files} 个文件需要整理")
 199:         print(f"\n将{operation_type}这些文件到子文件夹...")
 200:     
 201:         # 复制或移动文件到目标文件夹
 202:         processed_count = 0
 203:         for file_path in all_files:
 204:             if os.path.isfile(file_path):
 205:                 filename = os.path.basename(file_path)
 206:                 target_path = os.path.join(target_dir, filename)
 207:                 
 208:                 # 检查目标文件是否已存在
 209:                 if os.path.exists(target_path):
 210:                     # 生成一个带时间戳的新名称
 211:                     timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
 212:                     name, ext = os.path.splitext(filename)
 213:                     new_filename = f"{name}_{timestamp}{ext}"
 214:                     target_path = os.path.join(target_dir, new_filename)
 215:                 
 216:                 try:
 217:                     # 根据配置选择复制或移动
 218:                     if delete_original:
 219:                         # 移动文件
 220:                         shutil.move(file_path, target_path)
 221:                         processed_count += 1
 222:                         print(f"已移动: {filename} -> {target_dir}/{os.path.basename(target_path)}")
 223:                     else:
 224:                         # 复制文件
 225:                         shutil.copy2(file_path, target_path)
 226:                         processed_count += 1
 227:                         print(f"已复制: {filename} -> {target_dir}/{os.path.basename(target_path)}")
 228:                 except Exception as e:
 229:                     print(f"{operation_type}文件 {filename} 时出错: {str(e)}")
 230:         
 231:         print(f"\n文件整理完成! 成功{operation_type} {processed_count}/{total_files} 个文件到 {target_dir}")
 232:     
 233:     # 处理logs和temp文件夹
 234:     directories_to_copy = ["logs", "temp"]
 235:     processed_dirs_count = 0
 236:     
 237:     print(f"\n开始{operation_type} logs和temp文件夹...")
 238:     
 239:     for dir_name in directories_to_copy:
 240:         source_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, dir_name)
 241:         target_subdir = os.path.join(target_dir, dir_name)
 242:         
 243:         # 检查源目录是否存在
 244:         if os.path.exists(source_dir) and os.path.isdir(source_dir):
 245:             try:
 246:                 # 如果目标文件夹已存在，先备份或删除它
 247:                 if os.path.exists(target_subdir):
 248:                     backup_timestamp = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
 249:                     backup_dir = f"{target_subdir}_{backup_timestamp}_bak"
 250:                     print(f"目标文件夹 {dir_name} 已存在，重命名为: {os.path.basename(backup_dir)}")
 251:                     os.rename(target_subdir, backup_dir)
 252:                 
 253:                 # 复制整个文件夹及其内容
 254:                 print(f"正在{operation_type}文件夹: {dir_name}...")
 255:                 shutil.copytree(source_dir, target_subdir)
 256:                 processed_dirs_count += 1
 257:                 print(f"已{operation_type}: {dir_name} -> {target_dir}/{dir_name}")
 258:                 
 259:                 # 如果设置为删除原始文件，并且是复制模式，则在复制完成后删除原始文件夹
 260:                 if delete_original:
 261:                     try:
 262:                         print(f"正在删除原始文件夹: {dir_name}")
 263:                         shutil.rmtree(source_dir)
 264:                         print(f"已删除原始文件夹: {dir_name}")
 265:                     except Exception as e:
 266:                         print(f"删除原始文件夹 {dir_name} 时出错: {str(e)}")
 267:                         # 尝试使用系统命令强制删除
 268:                         try:
 269:                             if os.name == 'nt':  # Windows系统
 270:                                 os.system(f'rmdir /S /Q "{source_dir}"')
 271:                             else:  # Linux/Mac系统
 272:                                 os.system(f'rm -rf "{source_dir}"')
 273:                             print(f"使用系统命令成功删除原始文件夹: {dir_name}")
 274:                         except Exception as e2:
 275:                             print(f"即使使用系统命令也无法删除原始文件夹 {dir_name}: {str(e2)}")
 276:             except Exception as e:
 277:                 print(f"{operation_type}文件夹 {dir_name} 时出错: {str(e)}")
 278:         else:
 279:             print(f"文件夹 {dir_name} 不存在，跳过")
 280:     
 281:     print(f"\n文件夹整理完成! 成功{operation_type} {processed_dirs_count}/{len(directories_to_copy)} 个文件夹到 {target_dir}")
 282:     
 283:     # 如果配置为删除原始文件，则执行清理
 284:     if delete_original:
 285:         print("\n正在删除output目录中的所有原始文件和logs/temp目录...")
 286:         
 287:         # 获取output目录中的所有文件
 288:         output_files = [f for f in os.listdir(output_dir) if os.path.isfile(os.path.join(output_dir, f))]
 289:         
 290:         # 保留.gitkeep文件
 291:         excluded_files = [".gitkeep"]
 292:         
 293:         # 删除文件
 294:         deleted_count = 0
 295:         for filename in output_files:
 296:             if filename in excluded_files:
 297:                 continue
 298:                 
 299:             file_path = os.path.join(output_dir, filename)
 300:             
 301:             # 验证文件是否已成功复制到目标文件夹
 302:             target_file_path = os.path.join(target_dir, filename)
 303:             if not os.path.exists(target_file_path):
 304:                 print(f"警告: 文件 {filename} 未成功复制到目标文件夹，跳过删除")
 305:                 continue
 306:                 
 307:             try:
 308:                 # 特别关注state.json文件
 309:                 if filename == "state.json":
 310:                     print(f"正在尝试删除重要文件: {filename}")
 311:                     # 确保文件没有被锁定
 312:                     try:
 313:                         with open(file_path, 'a'):
 314:                             pass
 315:                     except:
 316:                         print(f"警告: 文件 {filename} 可能被锁定，尝试使用其他方法删除")
 317:                 
 318:                 os.remove(file_path)
 319:                 deleted_count += 1
 320:                 print(f"已删除文件: {filename}")
 321:             except Exception as e:
 322:                 print(f"删除文件 {filename} 时出错: {str(e)}")
 323:                 # 尝试使用force选项删除
 324:                 try:
 325:                     import stat
 326:                     # 修改文件权限
 327:                     os.chmod(file_path, stat.S_IWRITE)
 328:                     os.remove(file_path)
 329:                     deleted_count += 1
 330:                     print(f"第二次尝试成功删除文件: {filename}")
 331:                 except Exception as e2:
 332:                     print(f"即使使用强制选项也无法删除文件 {filename}: {str(e2)}")
 333:         
 334:         # 注意：这部分代码现在是多余的，因为我们已经在上面处理了logs和temp目录
 335:         # 但为了保持与原代码的兼容性，我们保留这部分代码，只是添加了检查
 336:         # 删除logs和temp目录
 337:         directories_to_delete = ["logs", "temp"]
 338:         for dir_name in directories_to_delete:
 339:             dir_path = os.path.join(output_dir, dir_name)
 340:             if os.path.exists(dir_path) and os.path.isdir(dir_path):
 341:                 try:
 342:                     print(f"正在尝试删除目录: {dir_name}")
 343:                     shutil.rmtree(dir_path)
 344:                     print(f"已删除目录: {dir_name}")
 345:                     deleted_count += 1
 346:                 except Exception as e:
 347:                     print(f"删除目录 {dir_name} 时出错: {str(e)}")
 348:                     # 尝试使用系统命令强制删除
 349:                     try:
 350:                         if os.name == 'nt':  # Windows系统
 351:                             # 先尝试关闭所有可能占用文件的进程
 352:                             os.system('taskkill /F /IM python.exe /T >nul 2>&1')
 353:                             # 等待一会让系统释放文件
 354:                             time.sleep(1)
 355:                             # 再次尝试删除
 356:                             os.system(f'rmdir /S /Q "{dir_path}"')
 357:                         else:  # Linux/Mac系统
 358:                             os.system(f'rm -rf "{dir_path}"')
 359:                         print(f"使用系统命令成功删除目录: {dir_name}")
 360:                         deleted_count += 1
 361:                     except Exception as e2:
 362:                         print(f"即使使用系统命令也无法删除目录 {dir_name}: {str(e2)}")
 363:                 
 364:         # 特别处理state.json文件
 365:         state_json_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "state.json")
 366:         if os.path.exists(state_json_path):
 367:             try:
 368:                 print("正在尝试删除state.json文件...")
 369:                 # 先尝试关闭所有可能占用文件的句柄
 370:                 try:
 371:                     # 尝试打开文件以确认它未被锁定
 372:                     with open(state_json_path, 'a') as f:
 373:                         pass
 374:                 except:
 375:                     pass
 376:                 
 377:                 # 等待一会儿让系统释放文件
 378:                 time.sleep(1)
 379:                 
 380:                 # 尝试删除文件
 381:                 try:
 382:                     os.remove(state_json_path)
 383:                     print("成功删除state.json文件")
 384:                     deleted_count += 1
 385:                 except Exception as e:
 386:                     print(f"删除state.json文件时出错: {str(e)}")
 387:                     # 尝试使用系统命令强制删除
 388:                     if os.name == 'nt':  # Windows系统
 389:                         os.system(f'del /F /Q "{state_json_path}"')
 390:                     else:  # Linux/Mac系统
 391:                         os.system(f'rm -f "{state_json_path}"')
 392:                     print("使用系统命令成功删除state.json文件")
 393:                     deleted_count += 1
 394:             except Exception as e:
 395:                 print(f"无法删除state.json文件: {str(e)}")
 396:                     
 397:         print(f"\n清理完成! 已删除 {deleted_count} 个文件/目录")
 398:     else:
 399:         print(f"\n按照配置保留了原始文件，未执行清理操作")
 400:     
 401:     # 返回处理后的视频在新位置的路径
 402:     # 如果input_video存在，尝试找到它在新位置的路径
 403:     if input_video:
 404:         input_video_name = os.path.basename(input_video)
 405:         new_video_path = os.path.join(target_dir, input_video_name)
 406:         if os.path.exists(new_video_path):
 407:             return True, new_video_path
 408:     
 409:     # 如果找不到特定视频，返回目标目录
 410:     return True, target_dir
 411: 
 412: def clean_logs_and_state(output_dir="output"):
 413:     """
 414:     清理日志目录和state.json文件
 415:     
 416:     Args:
 417:         output_dir: 输出目录路径
 418:     
 419:     Returns:
 420:         bool: 是否成功清理
 421:     """
 422:     print("\n===== 清理日志和状态文件 =====")
 423:     
 424:     # 关闭所有日志处理器
 425:     for logger_name in logging.root.manager.loggerDict:
 426:         logger = logging.getLogger(logger_name)
 427:         if logger.handlers:
 428:             for handler in logger.handlers[:]:
 429:                 logger.removeHandler(handler)
 430:                 if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
 431:                     handler.close()
 432:     
 433:     for handler in logging.root.handlers[:]:
 434:         logging.root.removeHandler(handler)
 435:         if hasattr(handler, 'close'):
 436:             handler.close()
 437:     
 438:     deleted_count = 0
 439:     
 440:     # 删除logs目录
 441:     logs_dir = os.path.join(output_dir, "logs")
 442:     if os.path.exists(logs_dir) and os.path.isdir(logs_dir):
 443:         try:
 444:             print(f"正在尝试删除logs目录...")
 445:             shutil.rmtree(logs_dir)
 446:             print(f"已删除logs目录")
 447:             deleted_count += 1
 448:         except Exception as e:
 449:             print(f"删除logs目录时出错: {str(e)}")
 450:             # 尝试使用系统命令强制删除
 451:             try:
 452:                 if os.name == 'nt':  # Windows系统
 453:                     # 先尝试关闭所有可能占用文件的进程
 454:                     os.system('taskkill /F /IM python.exe /T >nul 2>&1')
 455:                     # 等待一会让系统释放文件
 456:                     time.sleep(1)
 457:                     # 再次尝试删除
 458:                     os.system(f'rmdir /S /Q "{logs_dir}"')
 459:                 else:  # Linux/Mac系统
 460:                     os.system(f'rm -rf "{logs_dir}"')
 461:                 print(f"使用系统命令成功删除logs目录")
 462:                 deleted_count += 1
 463:             except Exception as e2:
 464:                 print(f"即使使用系统命令也无法删除logs目录: {str(e2)}")
 465:                 return False
 466:     
 467:     # 删除state.json文件
 468:     state_json_path = os.path.join(output_dir, "state.json")
 469:     if os.path.exists(state_json_path):
 470:         try:
 471:             print("正在尝试删除state.json文件...")
 472:             # 先尝试关闭所有可能占用文件的句柄
 473:             try:
 474:                 # 尝试打开文件以确认它未被锁定
 475:                 with open(state_json_path, 'a') as f:
 476:                     pass
 477:             except:
 478:                 pass
 479:             
 480:             # 等待一会儿让系统释放文件
 481:             time.sleep(1)
 482:             
 483:             # 尝试删除文件
 484:             try:
 485:                 os.remove(state_json_path)
 486:                 print("成功删除state.json文件")
 487:                 deleted_count += 1
 488:             except Exception as e:
 489:                 print(f"删除state.json文件时出错: {str(e)}")
 490:                 # 尝试使用系统命令强制删除
 491:                 if os.name == 'nt':  # Windows系统
 492:                     os.system(f'del /F /Q "{state_json_path}"')
 493:                 else:  # Linux/Mac系统
 494:                     os.system(f'rm -f "{state_json_path}"')
 495:                 print("使用系统命令成功删除state.json文件")
 496:                 deleted_count += 1
 497:         except Exception as e:
 498:             print(f"无法删除state.json文件: {str(e)}")
 499:             return False
 500:     
 501:     print(f"\n清理完成! 已删除 {deleted_count} 个文件/目录")
 502:     return True
 503: 
 504: 
 505: if __name__ == "__main__":
 506:     # 这里可以添加独立运行时的测试代码
 507:     from config import get_config
 508:     
 509:     # 检查是否只需要清理日志和状态文件
 510:     if len(sys.argv) > 1 and sys.argv[1] == "--clean":
 511:         output_dir = "output"  # 默认输出目录
 512:         
 513:         # 如果提供了输出目录参数
 514:         if len(sys.argv) > 2:
 515:             output_dir = sys.argv[2]
 516:             
 517:         success = clean_logs_and_state(output_dir)
 518:         if success:
 519:             print("清理成功")
 520:             sys.exit(0)
 521:         else:
 522:             print("清理失败")
 523:             sys.exit(1)
 524:     
 525:     # 否则，执行正常的文件整理流程
 526:     config = get_config()
 527:     
 528:     # 确保输出目录存在
 529:     os.makedirs(config["output_dir"], exist_ok=True)
 530:     
 531:     # 如果提供了输入视频，使用它；否则传入None让函数自动找
 532:     input_video = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else None
 533:     
 534:     # 执行文件整理
 535:     success, output_video = step9_organize_files(input_video, config)
 536:     
 537:     if success:
 538:         print(f"文件整理成功，视频文件路径: {output_video}")
 539:         sys.exit(0)
 540:     else:
 541:         print("文件整理失败")
 542:         sys.exit(1)
